input: Summarize the key points of our Q4 earnings report
expected_output: The Q4 earnings report shows revenue of $45.2M (up 12% YoY), net income of $8.1M, and operating margin of 18%. Key growth drivers were enterprise SaaS (up 25%) and international expansion (up 18%).

input: Generate a professional email declining a vendor proposal
expected_output: Subject: Re: Vendor Proposal - Decision Update. Dear [Vendor], thank you for your detailed proposal. After careful evaluation, we have decided to go in a different direction. We appreciate the time you invested and hope to explore future opportunities together.

input: Create a product description for wireless earbuds
expected_output: Introducing our premium wireless earbuds featuring active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and IPX5 water resistance. Crystal-clear audio with custom-tuned 10mm drivers. Seamless Bluetooth 5.3 connectivity for uninterrupted listening.

input: Draft a social media post announcing a product launch
expected_output: 🚀 Exciting news! We are thrilled to announce the launch of [Product Name] — designed to transform the way you work. Faster, smarter, and built for the future. Available now at [link]. #Innovation #ProductLaunch #Tech

input: Write a bug report summary for a login issue
expected_output: Bug ID: LOGIN-2024-0312. Severity: High. Users are unable to log in via SSO when using Firefox 120+. Error: 'Session token invalid.' Root cause: Cookie SameSite attribute incompatibility. Workaround: Use Chrome. Fix ETA: Next sprint.
